title: Jim Hanvey, Detective
writer: Octavus Roy Cohen, Olive Cooper, Joseph Krumgold
actors: Guy Kibbee, Tom Brown, Lucie Kaye
plot: Jim Hanvey is a genial but top-notch detective who has retired to his country home. An insurance company hires him to find a missing emerald so they won't have to pay out the $100,000 for which the jewel is insured. It doesn't tak...
